content:
# Reservoir Engineering

**Summary**: The application of engineering principles to the development and production of oil and gas reservoirs.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1990-al-jarri|Al-Jarri, 1990]] applied reservoir engineering principles to develop more accurate fluid property correlations.

- [[1998-khan|Khan, 1998]] applied reservoir-engineering to evaluate horizontal well behavior under various drive mechanisms.

- [[1990-mimoune|Mimoune, 1990]] applied reservoir engineering principles to optimize well performance in fractured systems.

- [[1994-muhammad|Muhammad, 1994]] addressed the problem of water shut-off in high permeability zones using gel treatments.

- [[1997-al-nashmi|Al-Nashmi, 1997]] applied reservoir-engineering to design water shutoff treatments using polymer gels.

- [[1995-okasha|OKASHA, 1995]] applied reservoir-engineering principles to solve problems related to tarmat barriers.

- [[1992-al-otaibi|Al-Otaibi, 1992]] applied reservoir engineering principles to develop pseudo relative permeability curves.

- [[2001-sultan|SULTAN, 2001]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993]] applied reservoir engineering to evaluate solver efficiency for a 5-spot pattern.

- [[2009-al-khalifa|Al-Khalifa, 2009]] addressed reservoir-engineering challenges in flow estimation.

- [[2009-bajaalah|BAJAALAH, 2009]] applied reservoir-engineering principles to analyze core samples.

- [[2010-al-dhamen|Al-Dhamen, 2010]] applied reservoir engineering principles to model dew-point pressure for better field management.

- [[2011-almubarak|ALMUBARAK, 2011]] applied reservoir-engineering to manage multi-lateral well systems.

- [[2010-mohammed|Mohammed, 2010]] focused on reservoir engineering for water flooding optimization.

- [[2011-al-dhufairi|AL-DHUFAIRI, 2011]] applied reservoir engineering principles to optimize geosteering via AI prediction.

- [[2011-al-shammari|Al-Shammari, 2011]] applied reservoir-engineering principles to model bottom-hole pressure in vertical wells.

- [[2011-alburaikan|AlBuraikan, 2011]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2012-al-arfaj|Al-Arfaj, 2012]] applied reservoir engineering principles to evaluate flow in multi-layered systems.

- [[2012-kamal|Kamal, 2012]] focused on reservoir-engineering by optimizing well parameters and fracture designs.

- [[2013-kareem|Kareem, 2013]] investigated acidization techniques for carbonate reservoirs.

- [[2013-sibaweihi|Sibaweihi, 2013]] applied reservoir engineering principles to optimize FAWAG parameters for maximum NPV.

- [[2013-khamis|Khamis, 2013]] addressed reservoir-engineering challenges in well construction efficiency.

- [[2013-al-mutairi|AL-MUTAIRI, 2013]] applied reservoir-engineering to model CO2 displacement behavior.

- [[2013-khan-2|Khan, 2013]] applied reservoir engineering principles to model radial composite systems with memory effects.

- [[2013-al-nemer|Al-Nemer, 2013]] focused on reservoir engineering by evaluating optimization algorithms for pressure transient analysis.

- [[2013-ahmed|AHMED, 2013]] applied reservoir-engineering principles to optimize well placement and chemical injection.

- [[2013-mehmood|Mehmood, 2013]] focused on reservoir engineering problems related to simulation scale and history matching.

- [[2014-al-julaih|Al-Julaih, 2014]] applied reservoir-engineering to optimize well placement and length.

- [[2014-ahmed-2|Ahmed, 2014]] applied reservoir engineering to solve well placement and rate problems.

- [[2014-ali|Ali, 2014]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2014-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 2014]] used to evaluate the performance of U-shaped horizontal well designs.

- [[2014-alao|Alao, 2014]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2014-al-ismael|AL-ISMAEL, 2014]] applied reservoir engineering principles to optimize well placement for both profit and stability.

- [[2015-zhang|Zhang, 2015]] applied reservoir engineering principles to optimize history matching algorithms.

- [[2014-khalid|Khalid, 2014]] focused on reservoir-engineering by studying acid reaction kinetics in carbonate rocks.

- [[2014-jamil|JAMIL, 2014]] applied reservoir engineering principles to model gas behavior in porous media.

- [[2014-mohamed|MOHAMED, 2014]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2015-barri|Barri, 2015]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2015-alloush|Alloush, 2015]] focused on reservoir-engineering by developing a new mathematical model for gas flow.

- [[2015-moussa|Moussa, 2015]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2015-khan|KHAN, 2015]] the research focuses on reservoir engineering by optimizing SAGD/VAPEX parameters.

- [[2015-rammay|RAMMAY, 2015]] focused on reservoir engineering by optimizing hydraulic fracturing parameters for maximum NPV.

- [[2014-hashmat|Hashmat, 2014]] addressed reservoir-engineering issues regarding fluid loss in fractured zones.

- [[2016-hamza|HAMZA, 2016]] applied reservoir-engineering principles to develop a new acidizing formulation for sandstone.

- [[2016-siddiqui|Siddiqui, 2016]] applied reservoir engineering principles to optimize foam injection parameters for EOR.

- [[2015-fogang|FOGANG, 2015]] investigated well stimulation techniques using viscoelastic surfactants and internal breakers.

- [[2016-mahboob|MAHBOOB, 2016]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2016-kalam|Kalam, 2016]] focused on reservoir engineering by developing a new correlation for water flooding in layered systems.

- [[2017-al-hajri|Al-Hajri, 2017]] focused on reservoir engineering by developing a new SBHP calculation method for wet gas wells.

- [[2017-mohamed|MOHAMED, 2017]] evaluated the impact of micronized barite on completion fluid performance in high-pressure environments.

- [[2017-mohammed-3|MOHAMMED, 2017]] focused on reservoir-engineering by developing a new fracturing fluid system for tight reservoirs.

- [[2016-david|DAVID, 2016]] applied reservoir engineering principles to model thermal flooding processes.

- [[2017-khan|Khan, 2017]] applied reservoir engineering principles to optimize CO2 injection parameters.

- [[2017-mahrous|Mahrous, 2017]] investigated matrix acidizing as a method to improve permeability in carbonate formations.

- [[2017-ahmed-2|AHMED, 2017]] applied reservoir engineering principles to design a more cost-effective acid system.

- [[2018-elsaieed|ElSaieed, 2018]] applied reservoir engineering principles to model non-isothermal flow in karst systems.

- [[2018-al-mashhad|Al-Mashhad, 2018]] focused on predicting flow rates in complex well configurations using AI tools.

- [[2019-abdelaal|Abdelaal, 2019]] applied reservoir-engineering principles to optimize foam parameters for EOR.

- [[2019-alawi|ALAWI, 2019]] focused on acid diversion techniques for well stimulation in carbonate formations.

- [[2020-al-abduljabbar|Al-AbdulJabbar, 2020]] applied reservoir engineering to evaluate ROP in carbonate and sandstone formations.

- [[2020-gowida|Gowida, 2020]] focused on reservoir-engineering by developing a method for sand consolidation.

- [[2020-aly|Aly, 2020]] addressed reservoir-engineering challenges in matrix acidizing and wormhole modeling.

- [[2021-aldhaif|AlDhaif, 2021]] addressed reservoir engineering challenges related to flow regime identification.

- [[2021-alsaihati|Alsaihati, 2021]] addressed reservoir impacts of lost circulation.

- [[2020-mahmoud|Mahmoud, 2020]] addressed reservoir-engineering concerns regarding the integrity of cement barriers in CO2 storage.

- [[2021-gasimli|Gasimli, 2021]] applied reservoir engineering techniques to study scale formation impact on permeability.

- [[2021-alsabaa|Alsabaa, 2021]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2021-khan|KHAN, 2021]] used reservoir engineering techniques to evaluate completion fluid impacts on permeability.

- [[2022-al-dahmoush|Al-Dahmoush, 2022]] applied reservoir-engineering concepts to improve drilling efficiency in abrasive sands.

- [[2022-jin|Jin, 2022]] focused on reservoir-engineering by predicting multiphase flow rates.

- [[2022-aboluhom|Aboluhom, 2022]] investigated wormhole propagation as a key aspect of acid stimulation in carbonate reservoirs.

- [[2022-alsulaiman|AlSulaiman, 2022]] focused on reservoir-engineering by optimizing acid fracture designs in carbonate systems.

- [[2022-alkathim|Alkathim, 2022]] focused on reservoir engineering by optimizing matrix acidizing parameters for carbonate formations.

- [[2022-alnasser|Alnasser, 2022]] focused on reservoir-engineering for heavy oil recovery using microwave heating.

- [[2023-suleiman|Suleiman, 2023]] applied reservoir-engineering principles to address asphaltene-related flow assurance issues.

- [[2023-alabdrabalnabi|ALABDRABALNABI, 2023]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2023-alameer|Alameer, 2023]] applied reservoir engineering principles to optimize well design for polymer flooding.

- [[2023-alharbi|Alharbi, 2023]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2023-sadeed|Sadeed, 2023]] applied reservoir engineering principles to develop a faster, data-driven model for production planning.

- [[2023-suleiman-2|Suleiman, 2023]] focused on the reservoir engineering challenges of hot water flooding in heavy oil systems.

- [[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023]] focused on reservoir-engineering by optimizing acid delivery systems for carbonate reservoirs.

- [[2023-khalid|Khalid, 2023]] applied reservoir-engineering principles to model gas flow and pressure in a large-scale pipeline network.

- [[2023-al-hakami|Al-Hakami, 2023]] applied reservoir-engineering to optimize CO2 flooding parameters.

- [[2023-ahmed-2|AHMED, 2023]] addressed reservoir-engineering challenges by improving cement integrity in deep wells.

- [[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024]] applied reservoir-engineering principles to develop TCFs for fracture cleanup.

- [[2024-suleiman|Suleiman, 2024]] applied reservoir-engineering principles to optimize CO2 injection parameters for wormhole formation.

- [[2024-suleiman-4|Suleiman, 2024]] applied reservoir-engineering principles to develop more durable water shut-off solutions.

- [[2024-al-drwish|AL-DRWISH, 2024]] focused on reservoir engineering by optimizing foamed acid for fracture stimulation.

- [[2024-alabdrabalnabi|Alabdrabalnabi, 2024]] focused on optimizing water shutoff treatments using Nanosilica technology.

- [[2024-moh-ali|Moh-Ali, 2024]] applied reservoir-engineering to evaluate TCF for both petrophysical enhancement and flow assurance.

- [[2006-adebowale|ADEBOWALE, 2006]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[1999-fawumi|Fawumi, 1999]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[1997-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 1997]] applied reservoir engineering to optimize well completion parameters.

- [[1994-hakim|Hakim, 1994]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2000-hashmi|Hashmi, 2000]] applied reservoir engineering principles to model a layered gas condensate system.

- [[1999-hasan|Hasan, 1999]] focused on reservoir-engineering by analyzing skin distribution and friction in horizontal wells.

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[1990-al-jarri|Al-Jarri, 1990]] ['mathematical-modeling', 'statistical-analysis']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Newer models outperformed existing ones in all tested ranges. ([[1990-al-jarri|Al-Jarri, 1990, p. 109]])

- Simultaneous bottom-water and gas-cap drive gives the best possible scenario for oil recovery at higher rates. ([[1998-khan|Khan, 1998, p. 20]])

- Determined that high permeability fractures are more critical for productivity than extreme length. ([[1990-mimoune|Mimoune, 1990, p. 25]])

- Gel treatment is used to divert flow from high permeability zones to unswept portions of the reservoir. ([[1994-muhammad|Muhammad, 1994, p. 20]])

- The results obtained could be used as a guide in the design of water shutoff treatments for field application. ([[1997-al-nashmi|Al-Nashmi, 1997, p. 16]])

- Hot water and solvent flooding were identified as viable methods for improving recovery in deep tarmat reservoirs. ([[1995-okasha|OKASHA, 1995, p. 38]])

- Pseudo relative permeability curves are used to reduce the dimensionality of reservoir models. ([[1992-al-otaibi|Al-Otaibi, 1992, p. 39]])

- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2001-sultan|SULTAN, 2001]])

- Compared various solvers including PSOR, LSOR, ADIP, SIP, CGTD, and NF. ([[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993, p. 149]])

- The ANN model for flow rate estimation provided superior results compared to existing correlations. ([[2009-al-khalifa|Al-Khalifa, 2009, p. 118]])

- A computer program was developed to estimate matrix and fracture permeabilities using non-linear regression. ([[2009-bajaalah|BAJAALAH, 2009, p. 127]])

- Artificial neural networks provided the best results among all models tested for predicting dew-point pressure. ([[2010-al-dhamen|Al-Dhamen, 2010, p. 10]])

- Improved overall reservoir performance by optimizing production rates and ensuring proper withdrawals. ([[2011-almubarak|ALMUBARAK, 2011, p. 17]])

- Optimization methods were used to improve injection efficiency and increase hydrocarbon recovery. ([[2010-mohammed|Mohammed, 2010, p. 57]])

- Predicting mobility profiles allows for better placement of horizontal sections and improved field development plans. ([[2011-al-dhufairi|AL-DHUFAIRI, 2011, p. 15]])

- ANFIS models provided more robust predictions across various GOR and water cut ranges compared to standard correlations. ([[2011-al-shammari|Al-Shammari, 2011, p. 40]])

- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2011-alburaikan|AlBuraikan, 2011]])

- AI models provided a more accurate estimation than Darcy's law for complex flows. ([[2012-al-arfaj|Al-Arfaj, 2012, p. 50]])

- Over 2000 simulation runs were conducted to compare horizontal, vertical, and hydraulically-fractured wells. ([[2012-kamal|Kamal, 2012, p. 67]])

- Optimized injection rates were identified as critical factors in controlling wormhole growth. ([[2013-kareem|Kareem, 2013, p. 102]])

- Optimization of well placement and cycle ratios were key engineering tasks to maximize Net Present Value (NPV). ([[2013-sibaweihi|Sibaweihi, 2013, p. 37]])

- Real-time optimization can lead to significant cost savings, as seen in cases where ROP was doubled. ([[2013-khamis|Khamis, 2013, p. 46]])

- Developed a modified Corey model to link wettibility changes to relative permeability. ([[2013-al-mutairi|AL-MUTAIRI, 2013, p. 63]])

- Proposed a new method for better reservoir description than standard normal diffusion models. ([[2013-khan-2|Khan, 2013, p. 101]])

- Pressure transient analysis (PTA) is one of the most powerful tools used to characterize hydrocarbon reservoirs. ([[2013-al-nemer|Al-Nemer, 2013, p. 16]])

- Optimized well placement in high/low permeability zones significantly improved NPV. ([[2013-ahmed|AHMED, 2013, p. 92]])

- Not stated in source ([[2013-mehmood|Mehmood, 2013]])

- Placement in the top layer resulted in the highest cumulative oil and the lowest water cut. ([[2014-al-julaih|Al-Julaih, 2014, p. 78]])

- Optimization is critical for mature fields to maximize recovery and manage costs. ([[2014-ahmed-2|Ahmed, 2014, p. 25]])

- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2014-ali|Ali, 2014]])

- The results confirm that the proposed production of long horizontal wells through the U-shaped horizontal well is a viable solution. ([[2014-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 2014, p. 14]])

- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2014-alao|Alao, 2014]])

- Optimization of well location is a critical step in ensuring long-term reservoir health. ([[2014-al-ismael|AL-ISMAEL, 2014, p. 18]])

- Integrating DE with LM provides a robust way to handle high-dimensional problems where trial-and-error is insufficient. ([[2015-zhang|Zhang, 2015, p. 71]])

- Acid dissolution rates and diffusion coefficients are key parameters for predicting wormhole growth. ([[2014-khalid|Khalid, 2014, p. 72]])

- Simulated the impact of bed porosity on heat and mass transfer. ([[2014-jamil|JAMIL, 2014, p. 19]])

- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2014-mohamed|MOHAMED, 2014]])

- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2015-barri|Barri, 2015]])

- Modified diffusivity equations provide more accurate pressure distributions in non-Darcy systems. ([[2015-alloush|Alloush, 2015, p. 48]])

- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2015-moussa|Moussa, 2015]])

- Optimization of well placement and control significantly impacts NPV. ([[2015-khan|KHAN, 2015, p. 15]])

- Optimization of fracture spacing showed that interference is minimal beyond 150 ft. ([[2015-rammay|RAMMAY, 2015, p. 74]])

- Not stated in source ([[2014-hashmat|Hashmat, 2014]])

- The use of DTPA with potassium carbonate as a catalyst successfully improved permeability in Bandera cores. ([[2016-hamza|HAMZA, 2016, p. 69]])

- Determined optimal injection strategy based on individual gas/liquid injection rates, CO2/N2 ratio, and foam quality. ([[2016-siddiqui|Siddiqui, 2016, p. 40]])

- Internal breakers are necessary to reduce the viscosity of VES gels to prevent formation damage. ([[2015-fogang|FOGANG, 2015, p. 20]])

- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2016-mahboob|MAHBOOB, 2016]])

- The proposed correlation provides a rapid alternative to time-consuming simulation while maintaining high accuracy. ([[2016-kalam|Kalam, 2016, p. 24]])

- The top node method outperformed four previous methods in predicting bottom-hole pressure. ([[2017-al-hajri|Al-Hajri, 2017, p. 13]])
